everyone_keeps_things_sometimes__but_for: Everyone keeps things sometimes — but for some people, letting go feels really hard.
hoarding_ocd_is_when_your_mind_gets_stuc: Hoarding OCD is when your mind gets stuck on the fear of throwing something away that might be important. It's not just being messy or sentimental — it's an exhausting cycle where everyday items feel too valuable to lose. A simple object can trigger thoughts like "what if I need this later?" and no matter how much you reconsider — the doubt doesn't fully go away.
reclaiming_your_space_takes_courage_youv: Reclaiming your space takes courage. You've taken the first step by understanding the loop. Recovery is possible.
the_cycle_repeats__fear_keep_relief_doub: The cycle repeats — fear, keep, relief, doubt, and then it starts all over again.
you_find_it_very_hard_to_throw_things_aw: You find it very hard to throw things away, even when you want to.
your_mind_turns_everyday_objects_into_so: Your mind turns everyday objects into something "important" or "just in case."
you_ask_others_again_and_again_if_its_ok: You ask others again and again if it's okay to get rid of things.
you_avoid_cleaning_or_organizing_because: You avoid cleaning or organizing because it feels too overwhelming.
